configuration.title: SVN
configuration.svn.ai.enabled.description: Enable AI-powered commit message generation using VS Code Language Model API (e.g., GitHub Copilot)
configuration.svn.ai.model.description: Specify the language model to use in 'vendor/family' format (e.g., 'copilot/gpt-4o'). Leave null to auto-select the first available model.
configuration.svn.ai.prompt.description: Custom prompt template for AI commit message generation. Use '{diff}' as placeholder for the diff content and '{language}' for the current VS Code locale (e.g., 'zh-cn', 'en'). Leave null to use the default prompt.
configuration.svn.commit.changes.selecte: Select all files when commit changes
Set file to status resolved after fix conflicts
configuration.svn.default.encoding.descr: Encoding of svn output if the output is not utf-8. When this parameter is null, the encoding is automatically detected. Example: 'windows-1252'.
configuration.svn.defaultCheckoutDirecto: The default location to checkout a svn repository.
configuration.svn.delete.actionForDelete: When a file is deleted, what SVN should do? `none` - Do nothing, `prompt` - Ask the action, `remove` - automatically remove from SVN
configuration.svn.detectExternals.descri: Controls whether to automatically detect svn externals.
configuration.svn.detectIgnored.descript: Controls whether to automatically detect svn on ignored folders.
configuration.svn.diff.withHead.descript: Show diff changes using latest revision in the repository. Set false to use latest revision in local folder
configuration.svn.gravatar.icon_url.desc: Url for the gravitar icon using the <AUTHOR>, <AUTHOR_MD5> and <SIZE> placeholders
configuration.svn.gravatars.enabled.desc: Use garavatar icons in log viewers
configuration.svn.ignoreMissingSvnWarnin: Ignores the warning when SVN is missing
configuration.svn.ignoreRepositories.des: List of SVN repositories to ignore.
configuration.svn.ignoreWorkingCopyIsToo: Ignores the warning when working copy is too old
configuration.svn.layout.branchesRegex.d: Regex to detect path for 'branches' in SVN URL, 'null' to disable. Subpath use 'branches/[^/]+/([^/]+)(/.*)?' (Ex.: 'branches/...', 'versions/...')
configuration.svn.layout.branchesRegexNa: Regex group position for name of branch
configuration.svn.layout.showFullName.de: Set true to show 'branches/<name>' and false to show only '<name>'
configuration.svn.layout.tagRegexName.de: Regex group position for name of tag
configuration.svn.layout.tagsRegex.descr: Regex to detect path for 'tags' in SVN URL, 'null' to disable. Subpath use 'tags/[^/]+/([^/]+)(/.*)?'. (Ex.: 'tags/...', 'stamps/...')
configuration.svn.layout.trunkRegex.desc: Regex to detect path for 'trunk' in SVN URL, 'null' to disable. (Ex.: '(trunk)', '(main)')
Regex group position for name of trunk
configuration.svn.log.length.description: Number of commit messages to log
Maximum depth to find subfolders using SVN
configuration.svn.multipleFolders.enable: Allow to find subfolders using SVN
configuration.svn.previousCommitsUser.de: Only show previous commits for a given user. Requires svn >= 1.8
Refresh remote changes on refresh command
configuration.svn.remoteChanges.checkFre: Set the interval in seconds to check changed files on remote repository and show in statusbar. 0 to disable
configuration.svn.showOutput.description: Show the output window when the extension starts
configuration.svn.showUpdateMessage.desc: Show the update message when update is run
configuration.svn.sourceControl.changesL: Set left click functionality on changes resource state
configuration.svn.sourceControl.combineE: Combine the svn external in the main if is from the same server.
configuration.svn.sourceControl.countUnv: Allow to count unversioned files in status count
configuration.svn.sourceControl.hideUnve: Hide unversioned files in Source Control UI
configuration.svn.sourceControl.ignore.d: Ignore unversioned files like .gitignore, Configuring this will overlook the default ignore rule
configuration.svn.sourceControl.ignoreOn: Changelists to ignore on status count
configuration.svn.update.ignoreExternals: Set to ignore externals definitions on update (add --ignore-externals)
configuration.svn.sourceControl.ignoreFi: Ignore VSCode's 'files.exclude' settings, only use SVN's own ignore rules. This prevents files hidden by VSCode's file explorer from being excluded from SVN operations.
configuration.svn.sourceControl.ignoreSe: Ignore VSCode's 'search.exclude' settings, only use SVN's own ignore rules. This prevents files excluded from VSCode's search from being excluded from SVN operations.
configuration.svn.hooks.commands.descrip: Hook commands for SVN operations. Each hook has a 'hook' name (e.g., preAdd, postAdd, preRemove, postRemove, preCommit, postCommit, preRevert, postRevert, preUpdate, postUpdate) and a 'command' to execute. Supports variables: $(file), $(fileName), $(fileBaseName), $(fileExt), $(fileDir), $(files), $(cwd), $(svnPath).
configuration.svn.hooks.commands.items.p: Hook name: 'pre' or 'post' + SVN command name (e.g., preAdd, postAdd, preRemove, postRemove, preCommit, postCommit, preRevert, postRevert, preUpdate, postUpdate)
